impact: This advances the PP&D plan by adding a deterministic, citation-backed permit-process fixture for online trade permit purchases, including eligibility facts, trade scope, contractor/license facts, fee/payment stop points, inspection scheduling stops, and action gates without live DevHub automation.
summary: Add a fixture-only online trade permit purchase workflow skeleton with validation.
target_task: Task checkbox-119: Add a fixture-only permit-process skeleton for an online trade permit purchase workflow using existing public fixture/source-inventory evidence only, with eligibility facts, trade scope, required license or contractor facts, fee/payment gates, inspection-scheduling stop points, and citation-backed action gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
